title: tournefortia zeylanica
intro: Tournefortia zeylanica, also known as Ceylon tournefortia, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic actions. The health benefits of Tournefortia zeylanica include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and cholesterol. Herbal preparations of Tournefortia zeylanica include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
